results.llm_answer: An accidental death is recognized for the full benefit if it results from a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that leads to death within 90 days. The full benefit amount of $10,000 is paid immediately in such cases.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This is a simplified issue whole life insurance policy designed 
to help cover funeral and final expenses. There are no medical 
exams or health questions required.

Your premium will never increase as long as you keep paying it.
Your coverage will never decrease.
This policy builds a small cash value over time.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
2. GRADED DEATH BENEFIT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMPORTANT: There is a waiting period for full benefits.

IF DEATH OCCURS:

During Year 1 (before May 1, 2025):
  We pay 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid

During Year 2 (May 1, 2025 - April 30, 2026):
  We pay 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid

After Year 2 (on or after May 1, 2026):
  We pay the full benefit amount ($10,000)

EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident 
at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all 
premiums paid.

An accident means a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that 
results in death within 90 days of the event.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
3. PREMIUM PAYMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
3.1 Your monthly premium is $87.50 and will never increase.

3.2 Premiums are automatically deducted from your bank account 
    on the 1st of each month.

3.3 If a payment fails, we will try again on the 15th.
2,	restart your policy within 2 years by paying missed 
    premiums with interest.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
9. IMPORTANT INFORMATION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
9.1 GUARANTEED ISSUE: This policy was issued without medical 
    questions or exams. The graded benefit schedule applies 
    because of this.

9.2 AGE LIMITS: Coverage is available for ages 50-85.

9.3 INCONTESTABILITY: After this policy has been in force for 
    2 years, we cannot cancel it or deny claims except for 
    non-payment of premiums.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This is a simplified issue whole life insurance policy designed 
to help cover funeral and final expenses. There are no medical 
exams or health questions required.

Your premium will never increase as long as you keep paying it.
Your coverage will never decrease.
This policy builds a small cash value over time.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
2. GRADED DEATH BENEFIT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMPORTANT: There is a waiting period for full benefits.

IF DEATH OCCURS:

During Year 1 (before May 1, 2025):
  We pay 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid

During Year 2 (May 1, 2025 - April 30, 2026):
  We pay 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid

After Year 2 (on or after May 1, 2026):
  We pay the full benefit amount ($10,000)

EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident 
at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all 
premiums paid.

An accident means a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that 
results in death within 90 days of the event.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. WHAT THIS POLICY PROVIDES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This is a simplified issue whole life insurance policy designed 
to help cover funeral and final expenses. There are no medical 
exams or health questions required.

Your premium will never increase as long as you keep paying it.
Your coverage will never decrease.
This policy builds a small cash value over time.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
2. GRADED DEATH BENEFIT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMPORTANT: There is a waiting period for full benefits.

IF DEATH OCCURS:

During Year 1 (before May 1, 2025):
  We pay 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid

During Year 2 (May 1, 2025 - April 30, 2026):
  We pay 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid

After Year 2 (on or after May 1, 2026):
  We pay the full benefit amount ($10,000)

EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident 
at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all 
premiums paid.

An accident means a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that 
results in death within 90 days of the event.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. WHAT THIS POLICY PROVIDES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This is a simplified issue whole life insurance policy designed 
to help cover funeral and final expenses. There are no medical 
exams or health questions required.

Your premium will never increase as long as you keep paying it.
Your coverage will never decrease.
This policy builds a small cash value over time.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
2. GRADED DEATH BENEFIT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
IMPORTANT: There is a waiting period for full benefits.

IF DEATH OCCURS:

During Year 1 (before May 1, 2025):
  We pay 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid

During Year 2 (May 1, 2025 - April 30, 2026):
  We pay 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid

After Year 2 (on or after May 1, 2026):
  We pay the full benefit amount ($10,000)

EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident 
at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all 
premiums paid.

An accident means a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that 
results in death within 90 days of the event.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This is a simplified issue whole life insurance policy designed 
to help cover funeral and final expenses. There are no medical 
exams or health questions required.

Your premium will never increase as long as you keep paying it.
Your coverage will never decrease.
This policy builds a small cash value over time.

6. HOW TO FILE A CLAIM
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
The beneficiary should call us at 1-800-COMFORT or send:
  • Death certificate (certified copy)
  • Completed claim form
  • This policy (if available)

Mail to: ComfortCare Claims, P.O. Box 777, Tampa, FL 33601

We will pay valid claims within 5 business days.

7. YOUR RIGHTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
7.1 30-DAY FREE LOOK: You can cancel within 30 days of receiving 
    this policy for a full refund.

7.2 CHANGE BENEFICIARY: You can change your beneficiary at any 
    time by calling us or sending a written request.

7.3 PORTABILITY: You own this policy. It stays with you even if 
    you move to another state.

8. IF YOU STOP PAYING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
8.1 After 2 years, if you stop paying premiums, your policy will 
    automatically continue with a reduced benefit amount based on 
    the cash value. No further premiums needed.

8.2 Or you can take the cash value and cancel the policy.

8.3 You may restart your policy within 2 years by paying missed 
    premiums with interest.
